partial_progress.details: Proved FF(psi) in deferralClosure case for restricted_single_step_forcing. The FF(psi) not in deferralClosure case remains as sorry - may require theorem statement weakening.

verification.notes: 9 sorries remain in SuccChainFMCS.lean. One case of restricted_single_step_forcing was proven. Build passes.

review_reason: The FF(psi) not in deferralClosure case cannot be proven with current theorem statement. Recommend: (1) strengthen hypothesis, (2) weaken theorem statement, or (3) use filtration approach.

metadata.key_insight: When FF(psi) in closureWithNeg, the intermediate formula G(F(psi).neg) is always in subformulaClosure, enabling the modal duality proof via drm_closed_under_derivation.
